keyEvents.text: Josh Gabriel (Grenada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Grenada 0, Costa Rica 1. Manfred Ugalde (Costa Rica) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Brandon Aguilera with a through ball.
